OpenAPI description of Kraken's public Spot REST API. Covers public market data (server time, system status, asset info, ticker, OHLC, order book, recent trades, recent spreads) and the private surface (account data, trading, funding, subaccounts, Earn, WebSocket token). Generated by the API Evangelist pipeline from docs.kraken.com/api/docs/rest-api/.
